phrases: I ate a juicy peach after lunch.
This peach is sweet and very soft.
We bought fresh peaches at the market.
The peach tree grows in our garden.
Would you like another peach?
My little sister loves ripe peaches.
There is a clock on the wall.
The wall needs a new coat of paint.
She hung a picture on the wall.
Don't write on the classroom wall.
The cat jumped over the wall.
Our living room has white walls.
The roof was covered with snow.
We heard rain on the roof.
The workers repaired the old roof.
A bird landed on the roof.
The roof keeps the house dry.
Leaves fell onto the roof.
Please close the gate behind you.
The school gate opens at eight.
We waited outside the gate.
A farmer walked through the gate.
The garden gate is made of wood.
The dog ran to the gate.
My books are on the top shelf.
She put the cups on the shelf.
The shelf is full of old photos.
I found the book on a high shelf.
Please put everything back on the shelf.
We need another shelf for our books.
There is some rice on my plate.
She washed every plate after dinner.
Please pass me a clean plate.
The plate fell onto the floor.
He put some fruit on the plate.
My plate is still full.
I drink coffee from my favorite cup.
Her cup is full of hot tea.
Please bring me a clean cup.
The cup broke when it fell.
He bought a new coffee cup.
There is a blue cup on the table.
I eat salad with a fork.
The fork is beside your plate.
Please use a clean fork.
She dropped her fork on the floor.
We need another fork for dinner.
The fork is made of metal.
I stirred my tea with a spoon.
She uses a spoon to eat soup.
Please give me a small spoon.
The spoon fell into the bowl.
He added two spoons of sugar.
The baby is learning to use a spoon.
I dried my hair with a towel.
The towel is hanging behind the door.
Please bring a clean towel.
She folded the towel carefully.
The wet towel needs to dry.
We packed two towels for the beach.
My pillow is soft and comfortable.
She bought a new pillow yesterday.
I sleep with two pillows.
The cat is sleeping on my pillow.
Please put your pillow on the bed.
This pillow feels much softer.
I sleep under a warm blanket.
The blanket kept us warm all night.
She covered the baby with a blanket.
This blanket is very soft.
We took a blanket for our picnic.
The dog is lying on the blanket.
Always wash your hands with soap.
This soap smells like flowers.
I bought a new bar of soap.
The soap made lots of bubbles.
There isn't any soap in the bathroom.
Please use soap before dinner.
Your answer is completely correct.
That's the correct way to do it.
Only one answer is correct.
The teacher checked every correct answer.
Please choose the correct option.
You were correct about the weather.
My answer was completely wrong.
Something feels wrong today.
You took the wrong bus.
It's wrong to lie to people.
The address is wrong.
I chose the wrong answer by mistake.
This park is safe for children.
It's safe to walk here at daytime.
Keep your passport in a safe place.
The baby is safe with her parents.
We arrived home safely and felt safe.
Always wear a helmet to stay safe.

ukrainian: Корисний (можна використати для певної мети, практичний, потрібний)
phrases: This dictionary is very useful.
She gave me some useful advice.
Learning English is useful for travel.
This app is useful for students.
The video was really useful.
He shared many useful ideas.
It is dangerous to swim alone.
The road becomes dangerous in winter.
Fire can be very dangerous.
Don't play with dangerous tools.
Crossing here is too dangerous.
Some wild animals are dangerous.
We have different plans for tomorrow.
This book is different from mine.
Everyone has different hobbies.
The two pictures look completely different.
Try a different way this time.
My brother and I are very different.
The sun is very bright today.
She wore a bright yellow jacket.
The room became bright after sunrise.
I need a brighter light to read.
His bright smile made us happy.
The stars looked bright tonight.
It's too dark to read outside.
The room became dark very quickly.
He wore a dark blue jacket.
The sky was dark before the storm.
Please turn on the light, it's dark.
We walked through a dark forest.
She was the first to arrive.
This is my first English lesson.
Read the first question carefully.
My first job was in a café.
Who finished the race first?
The first day was exciting.
He was the last person to leave.
This is the last page of the book.
We met each other last weekend.
I caught the last bus home.
That was my last piece of cake.
The last question was difficult.
The next lesson starts at ten.
I'll see you next week.
Who is the next person in line?
Our next trip will be to the mountains.
Turn to the next page.
The next train arrives soon.
Wash your hands before dinner.
Please finish your homework before bedtime.
We met before the movie started.
Think carefully before you answer.
I always exercise before work.
Call me before you leave.
We played football after school.
She went home after work.
I'll call you after dinner.
After the lesson, we went outside.
He felt tired after the trip.
Let's meet after lunch.
We met at the train station.
The bus station is very busy today.
Our station is only two stops away.
The train arrived at the station.
Please wait for me at the station.
There is a café inside the station.
My mother works in a modern office.
The office is close to the station.
He arrived at the office early.
Our office has a small kitchen.
She left the office at six.
The office is closed on Sundays.
We bought fresh fruit at the market.
The market opens early every morning.
There were many people at the market.
My grandmother sells vegetables at the market.
Let's go to the market together.
The market is closed on Monday.
We visited a science museum yesterday.
The museum has many interesting paintings.
I'd like to visit that museum again.
The children enjoyed the museum tour.
You can't touch anything in the museum.
The museum is open every weekend.
We spent the whole day at the zoo.
The zoo has many wild animals.
My favorite animal at the zoo was the tiger.
The children were excited to visit the zoo.
Let's go to the zoo this weekend.
We took lots of photos at the zoo.
We stayed in a small hotel near the beach.
The hotel has clean and comfortable rooms.
Our hotel was close to the city center.
They booked a hotel for two nights.
The hotel serves breakfast every morning.
We arrived at the hotel late.
I read books on my tablet.
My tablet has a large screen.
She takes her tablet to school.
The tablet needs to be charged.
I use my tablet to learn English.
His new tablet is very fast.
The screen is too bright today.
Please clean the computer screen carefully.
I looked at the screen for hours.
There is a small scratch on the screen.
The movie appeared on the big screen.
My phone screen is cracked.
My head hurts after the long trip.
He shook his head slowly.
She put a hat on her head.
The ball hit me on the head.
Please keep your head up.
I washed my hair and head.
I hurt my finger while cooking.
She pointed at the picture with her finger.
The ring fits my finger perfectly.
He counted on his fingers.
Be careful not to cut your finger.
The baby held my finger.
I stayed home because I was sick.
She still feels a little sick.
He looks sick today.
Many students were sick last week.
Drink more water if you feel sick.
My brother is sick with a cold.

ukrainian: Здоровий (корисний для здоров'я, міцний, у хорошому стані)
phrases: Eating vegetables helps you stay healthy.
She has a healthy lifestyle.
Healthy food gives us energy.
My grandparents are healthy for their age.
Walking every day is healthy.
The doctor says he is healthy.
These shoes were surprisingly cheap.
We found a cheap hotel near the station.
The market sells cheap fruit.
This restaurant is cheap but good.
I bought a cheap notebook.
The ticket was much cheaper online.

ukrainian: Тому що (оскільки, через те що, бо)
phrases: I stayed home because I felt tired.
She smiled because she was happy.
We hurried because the bus was coming.
He wore a jacket because it was cold.
I study English because I enjoy it.
They left early because it started raining.
I also enjoy reading adventure books.
She also speaks a little Spanish.
We also need some milk.
He also wants to come with us.
My sister also likes this game.
The hotel also has a swimming pool.
This soup is very tasty.
I am very excited about the trip.
She speaks English very well.
The weather is very warm today.
Thank you very much for your help.
The test was very easy.
I want to come too.
She likes this song too.
It's too cold to swim.
The bag is too heavy.
My brother came too.
You're too close to the road.

ukrainian: Більше (додатково, у більшій кількості, більшою мірою)
phrases: Can I have some more juice?
I need more time to finish.
She wants to learn more English.
We need more chairs for everyone.
Read more books this year.
He works more carefully now.
I eat less sugar now.
We have less homework today.
Try to spend less money.
He watches less television now.
There is less water in the bottle.
I need less help than before.
Many people visit this museum.
We have many interesting books.
There are many birds in the park.
She has many good friends.
Many students came early.
How many apples do you need?
Only a few students were late.
We have a few questions.
There are few cars on this road.
I know a few English songs.
A few birds sat on the tree.
He has very few free days.
I call my parents every evening.
Every child received a gift.
She drinks tea every morning.
Every answer was correct.
We practice English every day.
Every room has a window.
Can I have some water, please?
She bought some fresh bread.
I need some help with this task.
We spent some time together.
There are some flowers in the garden.
Would you like some cake?
Someone knocked on the door.
I think someone is calling you.
Someone left a bag here.
Ask someone for directions.
Someone forgot their umbrella.
I heard someone laughing outside.
